title: Menthol & Mint Oils
desc: Spearmint, peppermint, mentha oil, menthol crystals and DMO in pharma, food and cosmetic grades.

title: Essential Oils
desc: Concentrated, steam-distilled plant extracts that capture the natural fragrance of flowers, roots and bark.

title: Aromatherapy Oils
desc: Extracts drawn from aromatic plant parts, formulated to support wellbeing and holistic use.

title: Spice Oil & Oleoresins
desc: Concentrated spice extracts widely used to enhance flavour across the food industry.

title: Carrier Oils
desc: Cold-pressed from fresh seed, used to dilute essential oils for cosmetic and therapeutic use.

title: Pine Oils & Derivatives
desc: Steam-distilled from pine needles, supplying a wide range of pine-based derivatives.

title: Aloe Vera
desc: Pure aloe gel and derivatives, grown and processed for agricultural and medicinal use.

title: Natural Butters
desc: Solid, nutrient-rich butters extracted from nuts, beans and kernels.

title: Herbal Extracts
desc: Amla, Ashwagandha, Brahmi, Methi and Shikakai extracts — 100% natural.

title: Speciality Chemicals
desc: Intermediate pharmaceutical ingredients derived from pine products and their derivatives.
